task_objective: Correct the Ludusavi log filename from ludusavi.log to ludusavi_rCURRENT.log.
design_decisions: Updated Ludusavi.log_show() to target ludusavi_rCURRENT.log instead of ludusavi.log based on user requirements.
results: Successfully updated the log filename, verified with tests, and pushed bug fix release v0.2.1. All 59 tests passed.
